subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down the laws and made them a fortress for His servants and a means for the preservation of His creation. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الاحکام و جعلها حصنا لعباده و عله لحفظ بریته طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
